mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tour_routes WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tour_routes (name, cover_image, images, tag, region, days, nights, price, description, highlights, includes, itinerary, suitable_for, best_season, notes, is_recommended, is_hot, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{tag}, #{region}, #{days}, #{nights}, #{price}, #{description}, #{highlights}, #{includes}, #{itinerary}, #{suitableFor}, #{bestSeason}, #{notes}, #{isRecommended}, #{isHot}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE tour_routes SET name = #{name}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, images = #{images}, tag = #{tag}, region = #{region}, days = #{days}, nights = #{nights}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, highlights = #{highlights}, includes = #{includes}, itinerary = #{itinerary}, suitable_for = #{suitableFor}, best_season = #{bestSeason}, notes = #{notes}, is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, is_hot = #{isHot}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
